subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who caused the nightingale to sing forth laudations in the grove of faithfulness, upon the branches with diverse melodies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن انطق الورقاء بالثناء فی ایکه الوفاء علی الافنان بفنون الالحان
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @East and West; communication between East and West
